project_context.vibe: Warm, inviting, appetizing, sensory, high-contrast, clean utility

rules: Use Playfair Display for main titles and card dish names.
Use Manrope for descriptions, meta info, buttons, and form labels.
Overlines/Categories on cards should be uppercase, tracking-[0.2em], text-xs.
Never use pure black or pure white except for card backgrounds.
The primary accent (Terracotta) should only be used for the main CTAs (Upload Button, Reset Button) and active states.
Background should feel like warm parchment or organic sand.

spacing_and_layout.global: Generous spacing. Main container should have p-4 on mobile and p-8 on desktop.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID (Adapted for Visuals). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 or 4 for dish cards. Tightly packed (gap-4 or gap-6).
spacing_and_layout.upload_state: The empty/upload state should be a large dashed zone (border-2 border-dashed border-[#EAE5DF]) taking up most of the viewport, with a soft inner background (bg-white/50). Should include an appetizing icon/illustration, a clear 'Why it is empty' message, and a single primary 'Upload Menu' CTA.
spacing_and_layout.mobile_first: Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile. Ensure the upload area is easy to tap/drag on small screens.

dish_cards.style: Neumorphism tactile variant but very subtle. Flat solid background, 1px delicate inner stroke (border-[#EAE5DF]), soft ambient shadow (shadow-sm), rounded-xl.
dish_cards.image: Image takes up top 50-60% of the card, object-cover, rounded-t-xl.
dish_cards.hover_state: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), shadow-md, border color darkens slightly.

loading_state.style: Instead of a generic spinner, use a skeleton grid that pulses warmly (bg-stone-200), or a fun marquee/message (e.g., 'Analyzing culinary delights...').

motion_and_interactions.transitions: transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease
motion_and_interactions.hover: All interactive elements MUST have a clear hover state (lift or color shift).
motion_and_interactions.loading: Animate the skeleton screens with animate-pulse.

icons_and_assets.usage: Use icons sparingly. Good for the upload placeholder (Camera or Utensils icon) and error states.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA standards. White text on Terracotta is highly readable.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the layout, overriding Shadcn defaults to match the organic/earthy theme. Use .js and .jsx extensions for files.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Import Playfair Display and Manrope via Google Fonts in index.css.
Build the Upload view as the initial state, filling the viewport. When a user uploads an image, transition to a loading state, then to the results view.
The Results view should be a grid of Dish Cards. Each card must show the generated image, name, price, category, description, confidence score, and an external source link (if available).
Add a 'Scan Another Menu' reset button at the bottom or top of the Results view.
Ensure the entire app is mobile-responsive since it will be used at a restaurant table. Emphasize large tap targets and legible typography.
Include appropriate error states for invalid image uploads or API failures.
